title: Balanced Parentheses
description: Given a string containing only '(', ')', '[', ']', '{', '}', determine if the brackets are correctly balanced and nested.

botCodes.code: let()=let s=try input_line stdin with End_of_file->"" in let st=Stack.create() in let ok=ref true in String.iter(fun c->if c='('||c='['||c='{'then Stack.push c st else if c=')'||c=']'||c='}'then(if Stack.is_empty st then ok:=false else let t=Stack.pop st in if not((c=')'&&t='(')||(c=']'&&t='[')||(c='}'&&t='{'))then ok:=false))s;if not(Stack.is_empty st)then ok:=false;print_endline(if !ok then"YES" else"NO")
